title: Elon Musk(Noise reduction)
description: A calm and professional male voice with a clear, measured delivery and a middle-aged tone. The voice sounds authoritative yet approachable, making it well-suited for technical explanations and educational narration.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: So, the key to effective noise reduction is... um... understanding signal processing at a fundamental level. We're basically teaching AI to distinguish between what humans want to hear and what they don't. It's like teaching a computer to be really good at selective hearing.

default_text: So, the key to effective noise reduction is... um... understanding signal processing at a fundamental level. We're basically teaching AI to distinguish between what humans want to hear and what they don't. It's like teaching a computer to be really good at selective hearing.

title: Mortal Kombat
default_text: Raiden summons warriors to Earthrealm kombat. Scorpion, Sub-Zero, Liu Kang stand ready. The ancient tournament begins anew. Shang Tsung watches from shadows. Choose your destiny, mortal ones. Test your might!

title: Hatsune Miku (Text To Speech)
description: A vibrant and cheerful young male voice with an energetic, melodic tone. Its high energy and friendly delivery make it well-suited for upbeat characters or digital personalities.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Hello everyone! Let's create wonderful music together! When my voice joins with your hearts, we can make dreams come true through digital harmony. I'll keep singing for you, bringing smiles across the world with every note. ♪

default_text: Hello everyone! Let's create wonderful music together! When my voice joins with your hearts, we can make dreams come true through digital harmony. I'll keep singing for you, bringing smiles across the world with every note. ♪

title: Donald J. Trump(Noise reduction)
description: A confident and authoritative male voice with a distinctive New York accent, characterized by an emphatic and persuasive tone. This voice sounds like an older man with a slightly raspy quality and a high level of energy.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Folks, nobody knows noise better than me, believe me. These other companies, they're terrible, just terrible with noise. But we have the best technology, the absolute best. We're going to make everything so quiet, so beautiful, you won't believe it.

default_text: Folks, nobody knows noise better than me, believe me. These other companies, they're terrible, just terrible with noise. But we have the best technology, the absolute best. We're going to make everything so quiet, so beautiful, you won't believe it.

title: Energetic Male
description: A youthful and energetic male voice with a clear, professional American accent. The tone is dynamic and enthusiastic, well-suited for high-energy announcements and promotional content.

samples.title: Intro
samples.text: Hey there! After months of intensive development, Fish Audio 1.5 has just launched with major improvements to expressiveness, stability, and cross-language capabilities.

samples.title: Sales
samples.text: Our AI voices can help you scale your business globally while maintaining that personal touch, whether it's for training videos, customer support, or professional voice-overs.

title: Sarah

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: When you're creating something new, there's this beautiful mix of wonder and fear. And it's overwhelming sometimes, and scary, but also incredibly magical. And even though the process isn't perfect, those moments of uncertainty make the whole journey more meaningful and real.

default_text: When you're creating something new, there's this beautiful mix of wonder and fear. And it's overwhelming sometimes, and scary, but also incredibly magical. And even though the process isn't perfect, those moments of uncertainty make the whole journey more meaningful and real.

title: ALLE
description: A young female voice with an energetic and friendly tone, ideal for social media content and product reviews. The voice is clear, expressive, and maintains a high-paced, conversational flow.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Okay, you guys literally need to see this new foundation brush I found. It's so incredibly soft and blends everything like butter. The best part? It's normally $45 but right now it's on sale for $28 with a free setting spray. Like, such an amazing deal!

default_text: Okay, you guys literally need to see this new foundation brush I found. It's so incredibly soft and blends everything like butter. The best part? It's normally $45 but right now it's on sale for $28 with a free setting spray. Like, such an amazing deal!

samples.text: Raiden! Shang Tsung! Kitana! Choose your destiny! Johnny Cage! Sonya Blade! Kano! Jax! Round One... FIGHT! Finish Him! FATALITY! Flawless Victory!

title: Super Smash Bros. 4/Ultimate Announcer
description: A powerful and authoritative middle-aged male voice with a dramatic, cinematic quality. It features a deep, resonant tone perfectly suited for gaming announcers or high-energy sports commentary.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Choose your fighter! Mario! Link! Samus! Battle mode: Team Smash! Three stock match! Ready... GO! Player One... DEFEATED! Player Two... WINS! Game Set! This battle's winner is... BLUE TEAM! New record!

default_text: Choose your fighter! Mario! Link! Samus! Battle mode: Team Smash! Three stock match! Ready... GO! Player One... DEFEATED! Player Two... WINS! Game Set! This battle's winner is... BLUE TEAM! New record!

title: My producer tag
description: A young female voice with a soft, breathy, and intimate quality. This voice features a rhythmic and polished delivery, making it ideal for music producer tags and creative social media content.
default_text: Produced by Lisbie. This beat is legendary. Yonkca on the track, you know it's fire. Ioda did his thing again. When the Aquarius touches it, magic happens. Listen close.
